It employs a seedless, agentic approach to generate synthetic datasets at scale, allowing users to define desired dataset characteristics through an explainable and controllable process that enables fine-grained resource allocation. We show the efficacy of our approach on a variety of datasets, rigorously testing both intrinsic and downstream properties. Our work (1) offers guidelines for synthetic data mechanism design, (2) provides insights into generating and evaluating synthetic data at scale, and (3) unlocks new opportunities for developing and deploying AI in domains where data scarcity or privacy concerns are paramount.
title_zh: 基于推理的合成数据生成与评估
abstract_zh: 尽管许多感兴趣的AI应用需要专门的多模态模型，但训练此类模型的相关数据本身却天然稀缺或难以获取。通过人工标注来填补这些空白不仅成本高昂、容易出错，而且耗时漫长，因此模型开发者越来越倾向于将合成数据视为一种可扩展的替代方案。然而，现有的合成数据生成方法通常依赖于手动提示、进化算法或大量来自目标分布的种子数据，这限制了其可扩展性、可解释性以及可控性。在本文中，我们提出了Simula：一种新颖的基于推理驱动的数据生成与评估框架。该框架采用无种子、代理式的方法，在大规模下生成合成数据集，使用户能够通过一种可解释且可控的过程定义期望的数据集特征，从而实现细粒度的资源分配。我们在多种数据集上验证了该方法的有效性，严格测试了其内在属性和下游性能。我们的工作（1）为合成数据机制的设计提供了指导原则，（2）深入揭示了大规模生成与评估合成数据的实践洞见，（3）为在数据稀缺或隐私要求严苛的领域开发和部署AI技术开辟了新的可能性。

title: ASI-Evolve: AI Accelerates AI
authors: Weixian Xu, Tiantian Mi, Yixiu Liu, Yang Nan, Zhimeng Zhou, Lyumanshan Ye, Lin Zhang, Yu Qiao, Pengfei Liu
abstract: Can AI accelerate the development of AI itself? While recent agentic systems have shown strong performance on well-scoped tasks with rapid feedback, it remains unclear whether they can tackle the costly, long-horizon, and weakly supervised research loops that drive real AI progress. We present ASI-Evolve, an agentic framework for AI-for-AI research that closes this loop through a learn-design-experiment-analyze cycle. ASI-Evolve augments standard evolutionary agents with two key components: a cognition base that injects accumulated human priors into each round of exploration, and a dedicated analyzer that distills complex experimental outcomes into reusable insights for future iterations. To our knowledge, ASI-Evolve is the first unified framework to demonstrate AI-driven discovery across three central components of AI development: data, architectures, and learning algorithms. In neural architecture design, it discovered 105 SOTA linear attention architectures, with the best discovered model surpassing DeltaNet by +0.97 points, nearly 3x the gain of recent human-designed improvements. In pretraining data curation, the evolved pipeline improves average benchmark performance by +3.96 points, with gains exceeding 18 points on MMLU. In reinforcement learning algorithm design, discovered algorithms outperform GRPO by up to +12.5 points on AMC32, +11.67 points on AIME24, and +5.04 points on OlympiadBench. We further provide initial evidence that this AI-for-AI paradigm can transfer beyond the AI stack through experiments in mathematics and biomedicine. Together, these results suggest that ASI-Evolve represents a promising step toward enabling AI to accelerate AI across the foundational stages of development, offering early evidence for the feasibility of closed-loop AI research.
title_zh: ASI-Evolve：人工智能加速人工智能
abstract_zh:
人工智能能否加速自身的发展？尽管近期的智能体系统在任务范围明确、反馈迅速的任务中表现出色，但它们是否能够应对推动真正AI进步所必需的高成本、长周期且弱监督的研究循环，仍不明确。我们提出了ASI-Evolve——一种面向AI for AI研究的智能体框架，通过“学习-设计-实验-分析”闭环来填补这一空白。ASI-Evolve在标准进化型智能体的基础上引入了两个关键组件：一个认知库（cognition base），将人类积累的经验先验注入每一轮探索过程；以及一个专用分析器，将复杂的实验结果提炼为可复用的洞见，供后续迭代使用。

据我们所知，ASI-Evolve是首个统一框架，首次实现了在AI发展的三大核心环节——数据、架构和学习算法——上由AI驱动的发现。在神经网络架构设计方面，它发现了105种顶尖的线性注意力架构，其中最优模型性能超越DeltaNet达+0.97分，接近近期人工设计改进成果的三倍提升。在预训练数据筛选方面，所演化的数据处理流程使平均基准表现提升+3.96分，在MMLU上的提升甚至超过18分。在强化学习算法设计方面，所发现的算法在AMC32任务上最高优于GRPO达+12.5分，在AIME24上提升+11.67分，在OlympiadBench上提升+5.04分。

此外，我们还提供了初步证据，表明这一AI for AI范式可超越AI技术栈本身，在数学与生物医学领域实现有效迁移。综合来看，这些成果表明，ASI-Evolve代表了迈向实现AI在发展基础阶段自我加速的重要一步，为闭环式AI研究的可行性提供了早期实证支持。

title: Compiling Code LLMs into Lightweight Executables
authors: Jieke Shi, Junda He, Zhou Yang, Chengran Yang, Mykhailo Klymenko, Thong Hoang, Xiwei, Xu, Zhenchang Xing, David Lo
abstract: The demand for better prediction accuracy and higher execution performance in neural networks continues to grow. The emergence and success of Large Language Models (LLMs) have led to the development of many cloud-based tools for software engineering tasks such as code suggestion. While effective, cloud deployment raises concerns over privacy, latency, and reliance on connectivity. Running LLMs locally on personal devices such as laptops would address these issues by enabling offline use and reducing response time. However, local deployment is challenging: commodity devices lack high-performance accelerators like GPUs and are constrained by limited memory and compute capacity, making it difficult to execute large models efficiently. We present Ditto, a novel method for optimizing both the model size of Code LLMs and their inference programs, particularly for statically-typed programming languages such as C. Our approach integrates two key components: (1) a model compression technique inspired by product quantization, which clusters model parameters into codebooks and quantizes them to lower bit widths while ensuring that outputs remain within a bounded error, as well as synthesizing the inference program for the quantized model; and (2) a compilation pass integrated into LLVM that automatically detects and replaces unoptimized General Matrix-Vector Multiplication (GEMV) operations with implementations from Basic Linear Algebra Subprograms (BLAS) libraries, which are highly optimized for runtime performance. The output of Ditto is an optimized and compiled executable for running selected Code LLMs. We evaluate Ditto on three popular Code LLMs, achieving up to 10.5$\times$ faster inference and 6.4$\times$ lower memory usage compared with their original inference pipeline, while maintaining accuracy close to that of the full-precision models (with an average loss of only 0.27% in pass@1).
title_zh: 将代码大模型编译为轻量级可执行文件
abstract_zh: 神经网络对更高预测精度和更高效执行性能的需求持续增长。大型语言模型（LLMs）的出现与成功，催生了众多用于软件工程任务（如代码建议）的云端工具。尽管这些工具效果显著，但云端部署也引发了人们对隐私、延迟以及对网络连接依赖性的担忧。在个人设备（如笔记本电脑）上本地运行 LLM 可以解决这些问题，实现离线使用并降低响应时间。然而，本地部署面临挑战：通用设备缺乏高性能加速器（如 GPU），且受限于有限的内存和计算能力，难以高效执行大型模型。我们提出 Ditto，一种针对代码类 LLM 模型尺寸及其推理程序进行优化的新方法，特别适用于 C 等静态类型编程语言。我们的方法整合了两个核心组件：（1）受产品量化启发的模型压缩技术，将模型参数聚类至码本中，并将其量化至更低比特宽度，同时确保输出误差在可控范围内；此外还自动合成量化后模型的推理程序；（2）集成于 LLVM 中的一个编译优化阶段，可自动检测并用 BLAS（基础线性代数子程序）库中高度优化的实现替换未优化的通用矩阵-向量乘法（GEMV）操作，从而显著提升运行时性能。Ditto 的输出是一个经过优化并编译后的可执行文件，可用于运行选定的代码类 LLM。我们在三个流行的代码类 LLM 上评估了 Ditto，结果表明其推理速度相比原始推理流程最高提升 10.5 倍，内存占用降低 6.4 倍，同时保持了接近全精度模型的准确性（pass@1 指标平均仅损失 0.27%）。

title: Token Energy Optimization (Semantic Cost Proxy) in GPT-2 Using Counterfactual Semantic Budgets: MetabolicGPT-2
authors: Abhijit Nayak, Raj Bhowmik
publish: 2026 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Information and Communication (ICAIIC)
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in settings where generation quality must be balanced against strict resource or verbosity constraints. Existing approaches to constrained text generation typically operate at decoding time, or optimize coarse proxies such as output length, with limited visibility into the semantic importance of individual tokens. In this work, we present MetabolicGPT-2, a GPT-2-based language model that learns an explicit token-level semantic cost proxy and generates under user-specified semantic budgets. Each token is assigned a non-negative cost that combines a corpus-driven synthetic prior with a counterfactual semantic cost (CSC) computed from a sentence encoder by measuring embedding change when a token is removed. We cast budget control as constrained optimization: minimize language modeling loss subject to an expected total proxy-cost constraint. We implement this by augmenting GPT-2 with a cost head, learnable token-cost parameters, a Lagrangian dual variable, and an online affine calibration layer that aligns proxy costs to CSC at the sequence level. Experiments on WikiText-2 illustrate that learned costs correlate with semantic importance and that budget settings shift the model toward lower-cost continuations while largely preserving fluency. Throughout, the term “energy” refers to this semantic proxy cost rather than direct hardware joules.
title_zh: 使用反事实语义预算优化GPT-2中的令牌能量（语义成本代理）：代谢GPT-2
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在越来越多的应用场景中被部署，这些场景要求在生成质量与严格的资源或冗长度限制之间取得平衡。现有的约束性文本生成方法通常仅在解码阶段进行控制，或优化诸如输出长度等粗略的代理指标，对单个词元的语义重要性缺乏充分的洞察。在本研究中，我们提出了MetabolicGPT-2——一种基于GPT-2的语言模型，该模型学习一个显式的词元级语义成本代理，并能在用户指定的语义预算下进行生成。每个词元都被赋予一个非负成本值，该值结合了基于语料库的合成先验与从句向量编码器计算出的反事实语义成本（CSC），通过测量移除某个词元后嵌入表示的变化来评估其语义影响。我们将预算控制建模为约束优化问题：在满足预期总代理成本约束的前提下，最小化语言建模损失。为此，我们在GPT-2基础上引入了成本头、可学习的词元成本参数、拉格朗日对偶变量，以及一个在线仿射校准层，用于在序列层面将代理成本与CSC对齐。在WikiText-2数据集上的实验表明，所学得的成本与语义重要性高度相关，且在不同预算设置下，模型会倾向于生成成本更低的延续内容，同时基本保持流畅性。在整个研究中，“能量”一词指代的是这种语义代理成本，而非实际的硬件焦耳能耗。

title: Design and Implementation of an IoT System and Logical Prototype Model Using the Circuitverse Open-Source Tool
authors: Meenakshi Kashyap, Pinky Yadav, Malarvizhi A, Sanjula S, Sonal Kumar, Kaustubh Kumar Shukla
publish: 2026 8th International Conference on Intelligent Sustainable Systems (ICISS)
abstract: The key intention of this work is to create an innovative path to implement IoT based device and its logical prototype. An open-source tool named as CircuitVerse is used to achieve the targeted goal. Several models have been designed logically tested and validated. The foremost benefit of this unique work is one can be able to implement a complicated IoT based architecture into a simple logical prototype model. Since, the entire process and costing is very low comparatively so it is more useful for the students and researchers because of its accuracy specially. In this research work through this paper the prototype model is correctly simulated and logically verified as well as shown the output by making use of LEDs in CircuitVerse environment. It has been also noted that the modular & hierarchical modelling method accomplished the system understandable, reusable, and better at finding and fixing bugs. Additional advantage of this work is mapping of prototype based logical design with the real hardware. So, in many ways it has been found that CircuitVerse tool is much effective for the IoT system design and implementation since, before hardware implementation it is providing one path to test and have some idea. This work has a huge impact in education for modelling, testing, and validating intelligent connected systems. The markable point is even in coming future people may think on the integration of the real-time cloud stages, the growth of physical hardware prototypes, which has unlimited applications like smart cities, healthcare and several monitoring cum industrial automation. Thus, it's a good multidisciplinary work in that people from different background can get involved and contribute for a better outcome.
title_zh: 基于Circuitverse开源工具的物联网系统设计与逻辑原型模型实现
abstract_zh: 本研究的核心目标是探索一种创新路径，以实现基于物联网（IoT）的设备及其逻辑原型。为此，采用了一款开源工具——CircuitVerse，成功达成了既定目标。研究中设计并逻辑测试、验证了多个模型。该工作的最大优势在于，能够将复杂的物联网架构简化为一个易于理解的逻辑原型模型。由于整个过程成本极低，因此对广大师生及研究人员具有极高的实用价值，尤其在准确性方面表现突出。本文通过仿真与逻辑验证，成功在CircuitVerse环境中实现了原型模型的正确运行，并利用LED直观展示了输出结果。此外，模块化与分层建模方法显著提升了系统的可读性、可重用性，并有效提高了故障发现与修复的效率。本研究的另一大优势在于，其逻辑原型设计可与实际硬件进行映射，从而为后续真实系统开发提供可靠依据。由此可见，CircuitVerse工具在物联网系统的设计与实现中表现出卓越的效能：在硬件实现之前，便为设计者提供了可靠的测试与验证路径。本工作对教育领域在智能互联系统建模、测试与验证方面具有深远影响。尤为值得一提的是，未来人们有望进一步整合实时云平台、物理硬件原型的发展，推动其在智慧城市、医疗健康以及各类监控与工业自动化等领域的广泛应用。因此，这是一项极具跨学科意义的研究，不同背景的人员均可参与其中，共同推动更优成果的实现。

title: VOAPI2: a Vulnerability-Oriented Testing Framework for RESTful APIs
authors: Lübin Xu, Zhuolin Zeng, Zhen Tang, Biao Xiao, Dong Chen
publish: 2026 International Conference on Communication Networks and Machine Learning (CNML)
abstract: With the rapid proliferation of Web services, RESTful APIs have become a fundamental building block of modern software systems. As APIs increasingly expose critical business logic and sensitive data, ensuring their security has emerged as a pressing challenge. However, most existing RESTful API testing tools primarily emphasize functional correctness and robustness, and thus often fail to effectively uncover security vulnerabilities that do not manifest as obvious crashes or server errors.In this paper, we present VOAPI2, a vulnerability-oriented inspection framework for RESTful APIs that explicitly targets security flaws by leveraging the intrinsic relationship between API functionality and vulnerability types [1]. Unlike conventional API fuzzers that explore endpoints indiscriminately, VOAPI2 adopts a guided testing strategy that first identifies security-critical endpoints by analyzing semantic cues in API specifications. Based on these cues, the framework generates vulnerability-specific attack payloads and embeds them into state-aware request sequences that respect API execution dependencies.To accurately determine whether a vulnerability is successfully triggered, VOAPI2 further incorporates a feedback-driven verification mechanism that analyzes API responses and observable side effects rather than relying solely on generic server error codes. We implement a prototype of VOAPI2 on top of an existing stateful API testing engine and conduct a preliminary evaluation on real-world APIs. The results demonstrate that VOAPI2 is capable of discovering security vulnerabilities that are missed by state-of-the-art API testing tools, including previously unknown security issues that were later confirmed by developers. These findings indicate that vulnerability-oriented testing is a practical and effective direction for improving the coverage and efficiency of RESTful API security testing.
title_zh: VOAPI2：面向漏洞的RESTful API测试框架
abstract_zh: 随着Web服务的迅速普及，RESTful API已成为现代软件系统的基本构建模块。随着API越来越多地暴露关键业务逻辑和敏感数据，确保其安全性已成为一项紧迫挑战。然而，现有的大多数RESTful API测试工具主要关注功能正确性和鲁棒性，因此往往无法有效发现那些不会表现为明显崩溃或服务器错误的安全漏洞。在本文中，我们提出VOAPI2——一种面向漏洞的RESTful API检测框架，该框架通过利用API功能与漏洞类型之间的内在关联，明确针对安全缺陷进行检测[1]。与传统API模糊测试工具无差别地探索所有端点不同，VOAPI2采用一种引导式测试策略：首先通过分析API规范中的语义线索识别出安全关键端点；基于这些线索，框架生成特定于漏洞类型的攻击载荷，并将其嵌入到符合API执行依赖关系的状态感知请求序列中。为了准确判断漏洞是否被成功触发，VOAPI2进一步引入了一种反馈驱动的验证机制，通过分析API响应和可观察的副作用，而非仅依赖通用的服务器错误代码。我们在现有有状态API测试引擎的基础上实现了VOAPI2的原型，并对真实世界中的API进行了初步评估。结果表明，VOAPI2能够发现当前最先进的API测试工具所遗漏的安全漏洞，包括一些此前未知的安全问题，这些问题后来得到了开发者的确认。这些发现表明，面向漏洞的测试是提升RESTful API安全测试覆盖率和效率的一种切实可行且高效的方向。

title: Lightweight Yet Powerful: Optimized Tightly Coupled Hyperdimensional Computing Accelerators
authors: Mohsen Asghari, Sebastien Le Beux, Ron Mankarious
publish: 2026 IEEE 17th Latin America Symposium on Circuits and System (LASCAS)
abstract: Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) is a hardware-friendly machine learning paradigm that encodes data into high-dimensional binary hypervectors, enabling efficient computation through lightweight bitwise operations. Existing HDC accelerators, often implemented on FPGAs, typically rely on custom instruction sets and co-processor designs to optimize performance. However, these architectures face programmability challenges and incur significant control overhead when interacting with the main processor. To overcome these limitations, we present a methodology for designing and optimizing tightly coupled HDC accelerators. The proposed method produces accelerators enhanced with a controller capable of decoding instructions corresponding to key HDC kernels, thereby reducing communication overhead and improving throughput. To validate the approach, we implemented the accelerator at the RTL level and modeled the entire system in SystemVerilog. Experimental results demonstrate that, compared to state-of-the-art architectures, the proposed method reduces software code size by up to 98% while achieving a <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$(3 \times$</tex>) speedup.
title_zh: 轻量级且强大：优化的紧密耦合超维度计算加速器
abstract_zh: 超维计算（Hyperdimensional Computing, HDC）是一种硬件友好的机器学习范式，它将数据编码为高维二进制超向量，通过轻量级的位运算实现高效计算。现有的HDC加速器通常在FPGA上实现，依赖于自定义指令集和协处理器设计以优化性能。然而，这些架构在与主处理器交互时面临可编程性挑战，并产生显著的控制开销。为克服这些局限，我们提出了一种设计与优化紧密耦合HDC加速器的方法。所提方法生成的加速器配备了一个控制器，能够解码对应于关键HDC核的指令，从而降低通信开销并提升吞吐量。为验证该方法的有效性，我们在RTL层面实现了该加速器，并使用SystemVerilog对整个系统进行了建模。实验结果表明，相较于现有最先进架构，所提方法可将软件代码规模减少高达98%，同时实现3倍的加速比。

title: Context-Aware Enterprise Vulnerability Prioritization and Remediation Recommendations Using Semantic Learning
authors: Sumit Prakash Dubey, Soumya Maity
publish: 2026 5th International Conference on Sentiment Analysis and Deep Learning (ICSADL)
abstract: Enterprise vulnerability management needs prioritization and remediation decisions that need attention beyond generic severity scores and keyword mappings. CVSS frameworks offer standardized severity estimates, but they do not provide the necessary organizational context or understanding of vulnerabilities and remediation details that are available as text. This paper presents a framework for context-aware vulnerability prioritization and remediation recommendations which help organizations prioritize and remediate vulnerability based on its risk it poses to organization and not its technical severity score. It combines semantic learning with risk modeling specific to the organization. This research takes vulnerability descriptions and remediation texts using dense semantic representations from a Sentence-BERT model, allowing for meaning-based retrieval. A machine learning-based risk scoring model includes contextual factors such as asset importance, exposure, and the likelihood of exploitation. Finally, it re-ranks remediation candidates within a unified learning-to-rank framework and provides clear and actionable guidance to cyber analysts for remediation. Experiments on a large enterprise vulnerability dataset show that our approach consistently outperforms lexical, semantic-only, and heuristic riskbased methods regarding Mean Reciprocal Rank and Recall@K, while still keeping query latency low. These results demonstrate the advantages of merging semantic learning with context-aware risk modeling for managing vulnerabilities in enterprises. This paper explicitly incorporates enterprise context into remediation ranking; the proposed framework bridges the gap between vulnerability prioritization and actionable mitigation. In addition, source attribution and decomposed scoring components improve explainability and auditability, supporting practical adoption in enterprise security operations.
title_zh: 基于语义学习的上下文感知企业漏洞优先级排序与修复建议
abstract_zh: 企业漏洞管理需要超越通用严重性评分和关键词映射的优先级排序与修复决策。尽管CVSS框架提供了标准化的严重性评估，但它们无法提供组织上下文信息，也无法充分反映漏洞及其修复细节的文本内容。本文提出了一种情境感知的漏洞优先级排序与修复建议框架，帮助组织根据漏洞对自身业务带来的实际风险进行优先处理，而非仅依据技术严重性评分。该框架结合了语义学习与针对特定组织的风险建模方法。研究利用Sentence-BERT模型生成密集语义表示，对漏洞描述和修复文本进行基于语义的理解与检索；同时，采用基于机器学习的风险评分模型，纳入资产重要性、暴露程度以及被利用的可能性等上下文因素。最后，在统一的学习排序（learning-to-rank）框架下对修复方案重新排序，并为网络安全分析师提供清晰且可操作的修复指导。在大规模企业漏洞数据集上的实验表明，本方法在平均倒数排名（Mean Reciprocal Rank）和召回率@K（Recall@K）指标上持续优于传统的词法匹配、纯语义检索及启发式风险驱动方法，同时保持较低的查询延迟。结果证明，将语义学习与情境感知风险建模相结合，在企业级漏洞管理中具有显著优势。本文明确地将企业上下文融入修复排序过程，所提出的框架弥合了漏洞优先级排序与可执行缓解措施之间的鸿沟。此外，源归属分析与评分组件的分解设计提升了系统的可解释性与可审计性，有助于在企业安全运营中实现实际落地应用。

title: Design of a PI-Controller ASIC for a Multilevel Converter Using High-Level Synthesis and LibreLane
authors: Francisca Donoso, Nelson Salvador, Christian A. Rojas, Jorge Marín, Gonzalo Carvajal
publish: 2026 IEEE 17th Latin America Symposium on Circuits and System (LASCAS)
abstract: This paper presents the design and validation of a fixed-point PI controller for power electronics applications, introducing a design flow based on high-level synthesis tools. The proposed design methodology tackles the long-standing challenge of migrating high-level floating-point representations of control algorithms into hardware-efficient fixed-point implementations suitable for FPGA prototyping and ASIC integration. A threelevel flying capacitor converter (3L-FCC) serves as the case study to demonstrate the approach. Using software-in-the-loop verification, the fixed-point design is shown to maintain functional equivalence with its floating-point reference. Furthermore, wordlength exploration is conducted to analyze trade-offs between accuracy, area, power consumption and resource utilization. The proposed design flow is validated using both proprietary and opensource high-level synthesis tools to generate RTL descriptions, which are later used for FPGA prototyping and verification and also processed through an open-source ASIC design framework with minor modifications. This flow complements the traditional RTL-to-GDSII flow by reducing HDL development time for designs derived from high-level algorithms.
title_zh: 基于高层次综合与LibreLane的多电平变换器PI控制器ASIC设计
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于电力电子应用的定点PI控制器的设计与验证方法，引入了基于高层次综合工具的设计流程。所提出的 methodology 有效解决了将控制算法的高层浮点表示迁移至适用于FPGA原型设计和ASIC集成的硬件高效定点实现这一长期存在的挑战。以三电平飞跨电容变换器（3L-FCC）为例，展示了该方法的应用效果。通过软件在环验证，证明了定点设计与其浮点参考模型保持功能等价性。此外，还进行了字长探索，分析了精度、面积、功耗和资源利用率之间的权衡关系。该设计流程采用专有及开源的高层次综合工具进行验证，生成了RTL描述，随后用于FPGA原型设计与验证，并在稍作修改后通过开源ASIC设计框架完成后续处理。该流程在传统RTL到GDSII流程的基础上，显著缩短了由高层算法衍生设计的HDL开发时间。

title: Agentic AI for Recon, Threat Analysis and Mitigation Reporting
authors: Kalaivani T, Charanya P, Abhindhira KP, Barath Kumar L, Santhosraj BS, Srinithi S
publish: 2026 5th International Conference on Sentiment Analysis and Deep Learning (ICSADL)
abstract: Digital attacks in the ever-changing digital environment are becoming highly complex, more common, and dynamic, and this has become a major threat to organization of all sizes. In this paper, the researcher introduces the design of an autonomous and intelligent cybersecurity system that will carry out reconnaissance, threat reporting, and mitigation of websites and IP addresses. Based on an agentic AI architecture, the system uses dedicated AI agents to perform tasks through information collection, vulnerability scanning, and threat pattern matching and result interpreting, which do not require the training of new models. Instead, it runs on the top of existing Large Language Models (LLM), such as GPT and open-source ones, to comprehend and argue about complex security situations A User Interface is used to enter missions, an Orchestrator is used to sequence tasks, Agent modules are used to interact with industry-standard pentesting tools (such as Nmap, Nikto, and SQLmap), a Safety module precludes actions that are beyond its purview, and a Reporter module provides actionable insights. Its framework is focused on automation, adaptability, and scalability, and also limits the use of manual analysis and allows quicker and more precise threat detection and remedies. By means of continuous learning and effective management of various penetration testing situations, this approach becomes a viable way of enhancing cybersecurity measures in small organizations and learning institutions.
title_zh: 用于侦察、威胁分析与缓解报告的代理型人工智能
abstract_zh: 在不断变化的数字环境中，网络攻击正变得日益复杂、频繁且动态化，已成为各类组织的重大威胁。本文中，研究人员介绍了一种自主且智能的网络安全系统的设计，该系统能够对网站和IP地址进行侦察、威胁报告及缓解。基于代理式人工智能（AI）架构，该系统利用专用AI代理通过信息收集、漏洞扫描、威胁模式匹配以及结果解读来执行任务，无需训练新的模型。相反，它运行于现有的大型语言模型（LLM）之上，如GPT及开源模型，以理解并分析复杂的安全状况。用户界面用于输入任务指令，编排器负责任务序列的调度，代理模块与业界标准的渗透测试工具（如Nmap、Nikto和SQLmap）交互，安全模块可防止超出其权限范围的操作，报告模块则提供可操作的安全洞察。该系统的框架注重自动化、适应性和可扩展性，最大限度减少人工分析的依赖，实现更快、更精准的威胁检测与应对。通过持续学习和对多种渗透测试场景的有效管理，该方法为小型组织和教育机构提升网络安全防护能力提供了切实可行的解决方案。

title: Explainable Artificial Intelligence in Software Engineering: Current Trends, Gaps, and Future Directions
authors: Adam Khan, Asad Ali, Muhammad Ismail Mohmand, Mahdi Zareei, Rajesh Roshan Biswal
abstract: Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) has gained increasing attention for improving the transparency of artificial intelligence systems. However, there is a less clear understanding of its adoption and research patterns in the field of Software Engineering (SE).This systematic literature review focuses on the use of XAI within SE and the prospects of cross-domain learning. To achieve this, twenty-nine studies applying XAI in Software Engineering (SE), published between March 2020 and April 2024, were reviewed, and their findings were compared with XAI practices reported in healthcare and finance. The findings show that SE research mostly uses local explanation techniques: 86% of the studies employ instance-level methods, such as Local Interpretable Model-agnostic Explanations (LIME), whereas global explanation techniques that provide an overall view of the model are used less frequently. In terms of application domains, XAI studies in SE are mainly focused on software defect prediction, while other domains, such as software testing, and effort estimation remain comparatively underexplored. Regarding implementation tools, scikit-learn is the most frequently used machine learning (ML) library in XAI-based SE studies, and less often, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and R based-frameworks are used. The current study is more comprehensive in terms of scope compared to the previous review, as it addresses four research questions, examines the types of explanations, and clearly mentions the utilization of ML libraries. The findings indicate that future SE studies should incorporate global explanation techniques, diversify XAI methods, and extend the research to underrepresented SE tasks. In addition, clear reporting of tools and libraries is essential to enhance reproducibility. Overall, although XAI in SE is progressing, the domain remains at an early stage, and insights from other fields may help improve interpretability, reliability, and trust in SE systems.
title_zh: 可解释的人工智能在软件工程中的应用：当前趋势、研究空白与未来方向
abstract_zh:
可解释人工智能（XAI）在提升人工智能系统透明度方面日益受到关注。然而，其在软件工程（SE）领域的采纳情况与研究模式仍缺乏清晰的认识。本系统文献综述聚焦于XAI在软件工程中的应用及其跨领域学习的前景。为此，我们回顾了2020年3月至2024年4月期间发表的29项将XAI应用于软件工程的研究，并将其发现与医疗和金融领域中XAI的应用实践进行对比分析。

研究结果表明，当前软件工程领域的XAI研究主要采用局部解释技术：86%的研究使用实例级方法，如局部可解释模型无关解释（LIME），而能够提供模型整体视图的全局解释技术则较少被采用。在应用领域方面，XAI在软件工程中的研究主要集中于软件缺陷预测，而其他重要领域如软件测试、工作量估算等则相对未被充分探索。在实现工具方面，scikit-learn是基于XAI的软件工程研究中最常用的机器学习（ML）库；其次较常使用的是TensorFlow、PyTorch以及R语言框架。

相较于以往的综述，本研究在范围上更为全面，不仅提出了四个研究问题，还系统考察了不同类型的解释方法，并明确指出了所使用的机器学习库。研究结果表明，未来软件工程领域的XAI研究应更多引入全局解释技术，丰富XAI方法的多样性，并将研究拓展至目前代表性不足的软件工程任务。此外，清晰报告所用工具与库对于提高研究的可复现性至关重要。总体而言，尽管XAI在软件工程领域正逐步发展，但该领域仍处于早期阶段。借鉴其他领域的经验，有望进一步提升软件工程系统在可解释性、可靠性与可信度方面的表现。

title: Source Code Vulnerability Detection Technology Based on Code Semantic Contribution
authors: Chunling Liu, Yonghe Tang, Jian Lin, Le Liu
publish: 2026 International Conference on Communication Networks and Machine Learning (CNML)
abstract: This research is dedicated to developing source code vulnerability detection technology based on code semantic contribution to address software security challenges. The research preprocesses source code functions by constructing a dictionary library of common programming naming conventions, builds data dependency graphs and control dependency graphs using the Joern tool, adopts BPE word segmentation technology, and combines sentence embedding variants and LSTM graph embedding for semantic feature extraction and embedding to achieve precise detection. The construction of the experimental environment takes into account both hardware performance and software compatibility. The Big-Vul, SARD and NVD datasets were selected and used for the experiment after cleaning and stratified sampling processing. Compared with methods such as Checkmarx, SySeVR based on BLSTM, VulCNN based on CNN, Devign based on graph neural networks, and LineVul based on Transformer, the results show that: The semantic contribution method of this study performed outstandingly in the comprehensive performance indicators, with a recall rate of 87.52%, an accuracy rate of 90.13%, a precision rate of 88.76%, and an F1 value of 0.881. It shows obvious advantages under different types of vulnerability detection, different code scales and training data volumes, and has lower false positive and false negative rates. This technology provides a more effective way for source code vulnerability detection and is expected to enhance the overall security of the software.
title_zh: 基于代码语义贡献的源代码漏洞检测技术
abstract_zh: 本研究致力于基于代码语义贡献的源代码漏洞检测技术，以应对软件安全挑战。研究通过构建常见编程命名规范的词典库对源代码函数进行预处理，利用Joern工具构建数据依赖图和控制依赖图，采用BPE分词技术，并结合句子嵌入变体与LSTM图嵌入方法进行语义特征提取与表示，从而实现精准检测。实验环境的搭建兼顾了硬件性能与软件兼容性。经过清洗与分层采样处理后，选取Big-Vul、SARD和NVD数据集开展实验。与Checkmarx、基于BLSTM的SySeVR、基于CNN的VulCNN、基于图神经网络的Devign以及基于Transformer的LineVul等方法相比，本研究提出的语义贡献方法在综合性能指标上表现突出，召回率为87.52%，准确率为90.13%，精确率为88.76%，F1值达到0.881。该方法在不同类型的漏洞检测、不同代码规模及训练数据量下均展现出明显优势，且误报率与漏报率较低。该技术为源代码漏洞检测提供了更高效的方法，有望显著提升软件整体安全性。

title: Realtime Sign Language to Text Conversion with AI Sentence Completion
authors: R. P. Narmadha, V. Ajay, S. K. Dharaneesh, S. Hareini
publish: 2026 5th International Conference on Sentiment Analysis and Deep Learning (ICSADL)
abstract: This paper is going to present a real time sign language translation system it can convert hand gestures into text using a webcam-based interface. User show a hand gesture and hold it steady for two seconds, which the system automatically recognizes the gesture and outputs the respective alphabet character. The proposed system is designed to enhance communication for individuals with speech and hearing impairments. Tracking and Hand detection are performed using the default MediaPipe hand landmark model, which enables accurate visual capture from live video streams. The extracted hand landmark features are processed using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) trained to classify sign language gestures at the character level. To enhance user experience and communication speed, a word and sentence prediction module is interfaced using the LLaMA 3.1 language model via API access on the Groq platform. The system is developed using Tensorflow and Python. This helps the system run directly in a web browser and provides real-time visual feedback through a simple user interface. Overall, unlike other sign language convertors, this paper presents on prediction of the words based on the sentence context which reduces a significant amount of time for the conversion of long sentences compared to traditional sign language conversion.
title_zh: 实时手语转文字并结合AI补全句子
abstract_zh: 本文将介绍一种实时手语翻译系统，该系统可通过基于网络摄像头的界面将手势转化为文本。用户做出一个手部手势并保持两秒钟不动，系统便会自动识别该手势，并输出对应的字母字符。所提出的系统旨在提升听力和语言障碍人士之间的沟通效率。手部追踪与检测采用MediaPipe默认的手部关键点模型，能够从实时视频流中准确捕捉视觉信息。提取出的手部关键点特征通过一个卷积神经网络（CNN）进行处理，该网络经过训练，可对手语手势进行字符级别的分类。为提升用户体验和交流速度，系统还集成了基于Groq平台API访问的LLaMA 3.1语言模型，实现单词与句子的预测功能。系统使用TensorFlow和Python开发，可直接在网页浏览器中运行，并通过简洁的用户界面提供实时视觉反馈。总体而言，与现有的其他手语转换工具不同，本系统创新性地基于句子上下文进行词汇预测，显著减少了长句转换所需的时间，相较于传统手语转换方式具有明显优势。

title: Semi-Supervised Learning and Blockchain Integration for Transparent Smart Contract Security
authors: Muhammad Sannan Khaliq, Love Allen Chijioke Ahakonye, Jae Min Lee, Dong-Seong Kim
publish: 2026 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Information and Communication (ICAIIC)
abstract: With the rapid proliferation of blockchain technology and smart contracts in consumer IoT systems, ensuring digital trust and security remains a persistent challenge due to vulnerability diversity, data scarcity, and limited on-chain auditability. To address these issues, this paper presents PureChain, a scalable trust framework that integrates semi-supervised deep learning for smart contract vulnerability detection with blockchain-based audit logging for transparent security assurance. The framework employs a lightweight Conv1D neural architecture trained via iterative pseudo-labeling and a Mean Teacher strategy, effectively leveraging tens of thousands of unlabeled contracts to minimize annotation requirements. Experimental evaluation shows that PureChain achieves macro F1-scores exceeding 99% and significant improvements in recall for rare vulnerabilities, outperforming both supervised and state-of-the-art baselines. The integration of blockchain ensures all detection events are immutably recorded, enabling accountable and verifiable device operation. These results demonstrate that adaptive semi-supervised learning, combined with on-chain transparency, provides a robust and efficient foundation for secure smart contract monitoring across IoT and edge environments, with future work targeting more adaptive pseudo-labeling, semi supervised learning (SSL) techniques and cross-chain generalization.
title_zh: 半监督学习与区块链集成在透明智能合约安全中的应用
abstract_zh: 随着区块链技术和智能合约在消费物联网系统中的迅速普及，由于漏洞多样性、数据稀缺性以及链上可审计性有限，保障数字信任与安全仍是一个持续存在的挑战。为应对这些问题，本文提出PureChain——一种可扩展的信任框架，该框架将半监督深度学习用于智能合约漏洞检测，并结合基于区块链的审计日志，实现透明的安全保障。该框架采用轻量级Conv1D神经网络架构，通过迭代伪标签法与均值教师（Mean Teacher）策略进行训练，有效利用数以万计的未标注合约，显著降低人工标注需求。实验评估表明，PureChain的宏平均F1分数超过99%，对罕见漏洞的召回率也得到显著提升，优于传统监督学习及当前最先进的基线方法。区块链的集成确保所有检测事件被不可篡改地记录，从而实现设备运行的可追溯与可验证。这些结果表明，自适应的半监督学习结合链上透明性，为物联网和边缘环境中的智能合约监控提供了稳健且高效的解决方案。未来工作将聚焦于更自适应的伪标签机制、先进的半监督学习（SSL）技术以及跨链泛化能力的提升。

title: Static Code Vulnerability Detection Framework for Secure Compiler Assisted Software Development Pipelines
authors: Arivazhagan P, Sunitha. P, M. Sakthivanitha, M. Vijaya Maheswari, S.K. Ramani, T. Thirumalaikumari
publish: 2026 8th International Conference on Intelligent Sustainable Systems (ICISS)
abstract: With the growing use of software systems in critical areas, securing the code while it is being developed has become a top priority. Traditional manual code reviews and testing can't often find subtler vulnerabilities for a significant security potential risk. This study fills the gaps of automated and accurate detection of static code vulnerabilities in secure compiler-aided software development pipelines. The goal is to have a strong structure that combines the static code analysis, the anomaly detection using machine learning, and the compiler-based instrumentation in order to detect potential vulnerabilities early in the development. The proposed framework uses the combinations of hybrid techniques of pattern-based vulnerability scanning, control-flow and data-flow analysis, and reinforcement learning models for prioritizing critical issues. Experiments were performed on commonly used benchmark datasets, such as the Juliet Test Suite, among several programming languages, and the detection accuracy of 96.3%, precision of 94.8%, recall of 95.1%, and F1-score of 94.9% were obtained, which were <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$8 - 12 \%$</tex> better than existing static analysis tools on all metrics. The results show the effectiveness of making compiler-level insights work along with machine learning models in proactive vulnerability detection. Conclusively it does not only improve the security posture of software development pipeline but also lowers the overhead of remediation of vulnerability post deployment which is a practical solution for secure software engineering.
title_zh: 用于安全编译器辅助软件开发流程的静态代码漏洞检测框架
abstract_zh:
随着软件系统在关键领域中的应用日益广泛，确保开发过程中的代码安全已成为首要任务。传统的手动代码审查和测试往往难以发现那些潜在风险较高但较为隐蔽的漏洞。本研究填补了在安全编译器辅助的软件开发流程中，实现自动化且高精度的静态代码漏洞检测这一空白。其目标是构建一个强有力的综合体系，将静态代码分析、基于机器学习的异常检测以及基于编译器的代码插桩技术有机结合，从而在开发早期阶段识别潜在的安全漏洞。

所提出的框架融合了多种混合技术，包括基于模式的漏洞扫描、控制流与数据流分析，以及强化学习模型以对关键问题进行优先级排序。实验在多个编程语言中使用常见的基准数据集（如Juliet测试套件）进行验证，结果显示，该方法的检测准确率达到96.3%，精确率为94.8%，召回率为95.1%，F1分数为94.9%，各项指标均比现有静态分析工具高出8%至12%。结果表明，将编译器层面的洞察力与机器学习模型相结合，在主动式漏洞检测方面具有显著有效性。

综上所述，该方法不仅显著提升了软件开发流程的整体安全性，还大幅降低了漏洞在部署后修复所需的成本与开销，为实现安全软件工程提供了一种切实可行的解决方案。

title: The Virtue of Hallucination: When AI Mistakes Make Software Safer
authors: Antonio Mastropaolo
abstract: “LLMorpheus: Mutation Testing Using Large Language Models,” published in IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering in 2025, proposes a large language model-driven mutation testing framework that moves beyond fixed operator catalogs by using context-aware code infilling.
title_zh: 幻觉的美德：当AI出错反而让软件更安全
abstract_zh: 《LLMorpheus：利用大型语言模型进行变异测试》，发表于2025年IEEE软件工程汇刊，提出了一种基于大型语言模型的变异测试框架，该框架突破了传统固定变异算子库的限制，采用上下文感知的代码补全技术。

title: From Structure to Semantics: Hypergraph-Based AR Assembly Guidance with LLM-Mediated Narration
authors: Xinda Liu, Bowei Zhang, Jiaju Xu, Jian Wu, Guohua Geng, Lili Wang
publish: IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
abstract: Effective Augmented Reality (AR) guidance for complex assembly faces a dual challenge: the inability of conventional liaison graphs to represent procedural logic, and the cognitive burden imposed by visual instructions. We argue that the solution requires a more expressive structure to overcome these representational deficits and a narration approach to mediate instruction complexity. Our method first employs an assembly hypergraph to capture the task's hierarchical information, from which an A* search algorithm generates an optimal assembly path. Then a Large Language Model (LLM)-mediated narration workflow is designed to address the ergonomic deficiencies of the machine-centric path. It employs an optimizer to improve fluency, followed by a narrator that crafts the steps into an intuitive instruction narration. A within-subjects user study (N = 24) revealed a progressive enhancement from our method's components. The transition from a liaison-graph baseline to the hypergraph alone improved objective outcomes by reducing task time and errors and improving subjective ratings (SUS, NASA-TLX, TAM, and ARI). Subsequently, augmenting the LLM-mediated narration maintained these gains while lowering cognitive load and elevating user experience and usability. Our findings indicate the value of our AR assembly design and discuss the opportunities of using LLM as a mediation layer for better user interaction.
title_zh: 从结构到语义：基于超图的LLM驱动叙述式AR装配引导
abstract_zh: 自2023年8月起，针对复杂装配任务的增强现实（AR）引导面临双重挑战：传统联络图无法有效表达流程逻辑，且视觉指令带来的认知负担过重。我们认为，解决这一问题需要一种更具表现力的结构以弥补表征缺陷，并采用叙述式方法来缓解指令的复杂性。我们的方法首先利用装配超图捕捉任务的层次化信息，进而通过A*搜索算法生成最优装配路径。随后，设计了一种由大语言模型（LLM）驱动的叙述工作流，以弥补机器中心路径在人因工程上的不足。该工作流先通过优化器提升语言流畅度，再由叙述模块将步骤转化为直观易懂的指导性叙述。一项包含24名被试的自身对照用户研究显示，本方法各组件的引入带来了逐步提升的效果。从联络图基线过渡到仅使用超图，即显著改善了客观绩效——任务时间与错误率降低，主观评价（SUS、NASA-TLX、TAM和ARI）也得到提升。进一步引入LLM驱动的叙述机制，在保持前述优势的同时，进一步降低了认知负荷，提升了用户体验与可用性。研究结果表明，本AR装配设计具有重要价值，并探讨了将大语言模型作为中介层以实现更优人机交互的潜在机遇。

title: A Short Review of Buffer Overflow Attack and its Prevention
authors: Ahmed Faraz
publish: 2025 15th International Conference on Mathematics, Actuarial Science, Computer Science and Statistics (MACS)
abstract: The unallocated random access memory locations provides loop holes to gain the access control of the system to the attacker. This loop hole in the software of computer system provides a big vulnerability to the attacker who gains the access of the system by exploiting Buffer Overflow Vulnerability. The Buffer Overflow attack is hybrid in nature, both the hardware and software are compromised by the attacker by gaining the access control of the system. As Internet of Things technology has been evolved and computer communication networks are more linked with it, the Buffer Overflow attack has become more security concern. In all the types of Buffer Overflow attack launched on the machines, the operating system level control is gained by the attacker which can harm the security of all the machines and devices connected to the compromised machines through Internet of Things. Securing Stack Pointer, Program Counter, Processor Status Word registers in safe locations in memory at the hardware level can prevent Buffer Overflow attack.
title_zh: 缓冲区溢出攻击及其防范的简要评述
abstract_zh: 未分配的随机访问内存位置为攻击者获取系统访问控制权提供了漏洞。这一软件漏洞使得攻击者在利用缓冲区溢出漏洞获得系统访问权限后，面临巨大的安全威胁。缓冲区溢出攻击具有混合性质，攻击者通过获取系统控制权，同时破坏了硬件和软件。随着物联网技术的发展，计算机通信网络与物联网的联系日益紧密，缓冲区溢出攻击已成为更加严峻的安全隐患。在针对各类机器实施的缓冲区溢出攻击中，攻击者通常会获得操作系统级别的控制权，从而危及所有通过物联网连接到被攻陷设备的机器和设备的安全。在硬件层面，将栈指针、程序计数器和处理器状态字寄存器安全地存储在内存中的指定位置，可以有效防止缓冲区溢出攻击的发生。

title: An LLM-Assisted Fuzz Testing Framework for Unmanned System Software
authors: Yupeng Zhang, Qing Wei, Shaoxun Liu, Yankun Xu, Haoyang Chen, Jinfeng Zhang
publish: 2025 International Conference on Cyber Resilience and Endogenous Safety &amp; Security (CRESS)
abstract: The booming application of unmanned system has led the software vulnerabilities of these systems becoming increasingly prominent. Fuzz testing is an effective approach to detecting software vulnerabilities particularly during the software development phase. However, the requirement for manually written fuzz drivers renders it a resource-intensive and expert-dependent task, which hampers the widespread application of fuzzing. To address these issues, we proposed an automated fuzz testing framework based on large language models (LLMs). First, we employ an intelligent code parsing module to circumvent the context length limitations of LLMs, enabling efficient processing of target project code. Second, we engineer a structured prompt template to guide LLMs in generating high-quality fuzz driver code. Subsequently, to mitigate the inherent propensity of LLMs to produce flawed code, we integrate a feedback-based correction mechanism. Finally, we have deployed an automated fuzzing platform and applied it to several typical software components for unmanned systems. The system performs notably well on relatively simple fuzz testing targets and alleviates the manual workload required for fuzz testing complex targets. Ablation experiments confirm that the feedback-based correction mechanism effectively enhances the performance of LLMs in fuzz driver generation. This framework provides a viable approach to automated fuzz testing and is expected to contribute to vulnerability analysis in unmanned systems.
title_zh: 一种基于大语言模型的无人机系统软件模糊测试框架
abstract_zh: 无人系统应用的迅猛发展，使其软件漏洞问题日益突出。模糊测试（Fuzz Testing）是一种在软件开发阶段有效检测软件漏洞的方法。然而，传统方法依赖人工编写模糊测试驱动程序，导致该过程资源消耗大且高度依赖专家经验，限制了模糊测试的广泛应用。为解决上述问题，我们提出了一种基于大型语言模型（LLMs）的自动化模糊测试框架。首先，我们引入智能代码解析模块，突破了大型语言模型在上下文长度上的限制，从而高效处理目标项目的源代码。其次，我们设计了一种结构化提示模板，引导LLM生成高质量的模糊测试驱动代码。为进一步降低LLM生成错误代码的固有风险，我们集成了基于反馈的纠错机制。最后，我们构建并部署了一个自动化模糊测试平台，并将其应用于多个典型无人系统软件组件中。实验结果表明，该系统在相对简单的模糊测试目标上表现优异，显著减轻了复杂目标模糊测试所需的大量人工工作。消融实验验证了基于反馈的纠错机制能有效提升LLM在生成模糊测试驱动代码方面的性能。本框架为自动化模糊测试提供了一种可行方案，有望推动无人系统漏洞分析的发展。

title: ADODroid: A Static Detection Model for Android Malware Based on GCN and BiLSTM
authors: Shuoyuan Zhang, Xinyou Zhang, Zonghai Zhu
publish: 2026 International Conference on Communication Networks and Machine Learning (CNML)
abstract: This article proposes a new Android malware detection model ADODroid. The model extracts three types of software features through static analysis: API call graph, data flow, and opcode sequence. The API call graph provides spatial semantic information of the software, the opcode sequence provides contextual semantic information of the software, and the data flow can enhance the integrity of spatial semantic features. Abstracting the API call graph to enhance the model's anti-obfuscation ability and reduce computational complexity, then embedding the data flow into the graph to enrich the spatial semantics of features, while converting the opcode sequence into embedding vectors. Finally, inject the graph data and embedding vectors into a fusion neural network composed of GCN and BiLSTM, and output the classification results. The experimental results on the AndroZoo and VirusShare datasets show that the detection precision of the trained ADODroid can reach 96%, while having stronger robustness than other similar methods.
title_zh: ADODroid：一种基于图卷积网络与双向LSTM的Android恶意软件静态检测模型
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的安卓恶意软件检测模型ADODroid。该模型通过静态分析提取三类软件特征：API调用图、数据流和操作码序列。其中，API调用图提供了软件的空间语义信息，操作码序列提供了软件的上下文语义信息，而数据流则有助于增强空间语义特征的完整性。通过对API调用图进行抽象化处理，以提升模型的抗混淆能力并降低计算复杂度；随后将数据流嵌入图结构中，丰富特征的空间语义表达；同时将操作码序列转换为嵌入向量。最后，将图数据与嵌入向量输入由图卷积网络（GCN）和双向长短期记忆网络（BiLSTM）组成的融合神经网络，输出分类结果。在AndroZoo和VirusShare数据集上的实验结果表明，训练后的ADODroid检测精度可达96%，且相较于其他类似方法具有更强的鲁棒性。

title: Detecting Test Case Smells Using Prompt Engineering: An Empirical Study in Industry
authors: Lennon Chaves, Flávia Oliveira, Leonardo Tiago
publish: 2025 9th International Conference on Computer, Software and Modeling (ICCSM)
abstract: In the software testing process, test cases are developed to verify whether the software functions as intended. Consequently, test cases must be comprehensible to those who will execute them, and to ensure that they are written comprehensively and accurately, Large Language Models (LLMs) can be employed to assist with this task. With the aim of recommending issues within test cases, this study developed a prompt with 12 smells that should be avoided in test cases to facilitate comprehension. To evaluate the prompt, an empirical study was conducted with 5 participants from a software test team, employing the prompt on test cases from the requirements validation scope of a real industrial scenario. During the study, for each test case, the participants recorded the number of smells recommended by the LLM and subsequently indicated whether they agreed, partially agreed, or disagreed with the response obtained for each test case. Among the results of this experiment, the detection of “Misplaced verification” was observed in 90% of the utilized test cases, while no test case exhibited any “Spell check” smells. Another finding was that approximately 63% of responses from the LLM were classified as “Agree” or “Partially agree” by the participants regarding the smells detected in the test cases, indicating that improvements are necessary for these test cases. Thus, this empirical study presents the results of applying a prompt with 12 test case smells to recommend issues in test cases that validate the requirements of carriers.
title_zh: 使用提示工程检测测试用例异味：一项工业界的实证研究
abstract_zh: 在软件测试过程中，测试用例的制定旨在验证软件是否按预期功能运行。因此，测试用例必须对执行者而言清晰易懂。为确保测试用例编写得全面且准确，可以借助大型语言模型（LLMs）来辅助完成这一任务。本研究旨在推荐测试用例中存在的问题，为此设计了一个包含12种应避免的“异味”（smells）的提示（prompt），以提升测试用例的可读性与质量。为评估该提示的有效性，研究团队在真实工业场景的需求验证范围内，邀请了5名来自软件测试团队的参与者开展实证研究。在实验过程中，每位参与者针对每个测试用例记录了LLM所建议的异味数量，并对每项建议判断是否同意、部分同意或不同意。实验结果表明，在所使用的测试用例中，“验证位置错误”（Misplaced verification）这一异味出现在90%的案例中，而“拼写检查”（Spell check）类异味则未在任何测试用例中被发现。此外，约63%的LLM建议被参与者评为“同意”或“部分同意”，说明这些测试用例仍存在改进空间。综上所述，本实证研究展示了应用包含12种测试用例异味的提示，对运营商需求验证阶段测试用例中潜在问题进行识别与推荐的有效性。

title: Optimized Arithmetic Architecture in Cryptographic Processor for IoT Embedded System
authors: Sivanandam K, Sugan N, Vijay P, Yasvonth V L
publish: 2026 8th International Conference on Intelligent Sustainable Systems (ICISS)
abstract: The arithmetic architecture of a cryptographic processor with a low-power and high-throughput model with Internet-of-things (IoT) nodes using minimal resources. Resourceconstrained Internet of Things (IoT) devices demand cryptographic solutions that offer strong security with minimal power and hardware overhead. In this work, an optimized arithmetic architecture for a cryptographic processor is presented, targeting low-power IoT embedded systems. The proposed design focuses on improving modular arithmetic operations by replacing conventional adder–multiplexer structures with a LUT-based arithmetic unit optimized for FPGA implementation. This architecture reduces critical path delay, power consumption, and logic utilization while supporting essential cryptographic operations such as modular addition and subtraction. The design is implemented and verified on a Xilinx FPGA using Vivado, where performance is evaluated in terms of power, delay, and power–delay product (PDP). Experimental results demonstrate a significant reduction in power consumption (up to 50%) and improved PDP compared to the existing architecture, validating the suitability of the proposed design for energy-efficient and secure IoT applications.
title_zh: 物联网嵌入式系统中加密处理器的优化算术架构
abstract_zh: 一种面向物联网（IoT）节点的低功耗、高吞吐量加密处理器的算术架构，该架构在资源受限的环境下实现最小化资源占用。资源受限的物联网（IoT）设备需要具备强安全性且功耗与硬件开销极低的加密解决方案。本文提出了一种针对低功耗IoT嵌入式系统的优化算术架构，旨在提升加密处理器的性能。所提出的方案通过将传统的加法器-多路选择器结构替换为基于查找表（LUT）的算术单元，以优化FPGA实现效果，从而显著提升模运算操作的效率。该架构在降低关键路径延迟、功耗和逻辑资源利用率的同时，仍能支持模加、模减等关键密码学操作。设计已在Xilinx FPGA平台上基于Vivado工具完成实现与验证，其性能通过功耗、延迟及功耗-延迟积（PDP）等指标进行评估。实验结果表明，与现有架构相比，该设计在功耗方面最高可降低50%，同时PDP性能得到明显改善，充分验证了该方案在节能与安全并重的物联网应用中的适用性与优越性。

title: FPGA Implementation of a Fault-Tolerant Low-Latency Reversible ALU Using Hybrid Parity-Preserving IG–NFT Logic Gates in Verilog HDL
authors: Kattubadi Abdul Raseed, S. Rambabu, Manubolu Venugopal Naidu, C. Gangaiah Yadav, Bikkili Alekya Himabindu
publish: 2026 4th International Conference on Intelligent Data Communication Technologies and Internet of Things (IDCIoT)
abstract: This paper presents a fault-tolerant, low-latency reversible Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU) designed using hybrid parity-preserving IG and NFT gates in Verilog HDL. Reversible computing minimizes energy dissipation and enables quantumcompatible designs, while parity preservation ensures on-chip error detection. The proposed ALU performs addition, subtraction, AND, and XOR operations with reduced quantum cost, fewer garbage outputs, and lower logic depth compared to conventional and earlier reversible ALUs, such as the hybrid Fredkin–Feynman ALU, Peres–HNG ALU. Synthesized on an Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA board with the VIVADO simulation tool, the design exhibits notable improvements in power efficiency, logic utilisation, and fault tolerance. Scalability for multi-bit operations and compatibility with quantum frameworks make the architecture suitable for low-power embedded systems, IoT processors, and cryptographic applications.
title_zh: 基于Verilog HDL的混合奇偶保持IG-NFT逻辑门实现容错低延迟可逆ALU的FPGA设计
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于混合奇偶性保持IG门与NFT门的容错、低延迟可逆算术逻辑单元（ALU），采用Verilog HDL实现。可逆计算能够有效降低能量损耗，并支持量子兼容设计，而奇偶性保持机制则实现了片上错误检测。所提出的ALU在执行加法、减法、AND及XOR运算时，相较于传统及早期的可逆ALU（如混合Fredkin–Feynman ALU、Peres–HNG ALU），具有更低的量子代价、更少的垃圾输出以及更浅的逻辑深度。该设计在Xilinx Artix-7 FPGA开发板上通过VIVADO仿真工具综合实现，展现出显著的能效提升、逻辑资源利用率优化以及更强的容错能力。其良好的可扩展性支持多比特运算，并与量子计算框架兼容，因此适用于低功耗嵌入式系统、物联网处理器以及密码学应用。

title: FPGA Architecture of Reliable High-Throughput Error Correction for UAV FSO Communication System
authors: Irzal Zaini, Ida Bagus Krisna Yoga Utama, Fadhila Ahmad, Muhammad Fairuz Mummtaz, Yeong Min Jang
publish: 2026 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Information and Communication (ICAIIC)
abstract: Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) Free-Space Optical (FSO) is the next generation technology in wireless communication systems. The high bandwidth potential of FSO communication is not without flaw, the optical wave is easily distorted by channel conditions and must have accurate tracking. To improve reliability, error correction must be applied. In this paper, FPGAbased error correction architecture is proposed to comply with the UAV FSO system. The design is based on Reed-Solomon (RS) code and Line Product Code (LPC). The proposed system utilizes the parallel processing and pipelining of Euclidean Processor in decoding unit, which increases data throughput significantly. Our design also offers low resource usage on the FPGA board, effectively reducing power consumption. Performance test shows BER of 10<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">−6</sup>, data rate at 8.921 Gbps, and power consumption at 1.6 W.
title_zh: 无人机FSO通信系统中可靠高吞吐量纠错的FPGA架构
abstract_zh: 无人机自由空间光通信（UAV FSO）是无线通信系统中的下一代技术。尽管自由空间光通信具有高带宽潜力，但其仍存在缺陷：光波极易受到信道条件的影响，且必须具备精确的跟踪能力。为提高系统可靠性，需引入纠错机制。本文提出一种基于FPGA的纠错架构，以满足无人机FSO系统的需求。该设计采用里德-所罗门码（Reed-Solomon, RS）与线性乘积码（Line Product Code, LPC）相结合的方案。所提出的系统利用欧几里得处理器在解码单元中实现并行处理与流水线操作，显著提升了数据吞吐量。此外，该设计在FPGA板上资源占用率低，有效降低了功耗。性能测试结果表明，系统误码率（BER）达到10⁻⁶，数据速率高达8.921 Gbps，功耗仅为1.6 W。

title: Reliable Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models using Multi-Source Evidence and Natural Language Inference
authors: Lakshmana Kumar T, Yasir Abdullah R, Vijayakumar M, Sanjai Prakash M, Gowtham A, Vignesh K
publish: 2026 8th International Conference on Intelligent Sustainable Systems (ICISS)
abstract: The rise of Large Language Model developments in re-shaping various Natural Language Processing (NLP) functional developments, however, despite their ability to produce plausible responses the generated responses will frequently fail to reflect factual accuracy, this misconception is referred to as Hallucination. This critical limitation undermines trust in AI systems and poses significant risks in domains requiring factual accuracy such as healthcare, legal analysis and educational content generation. Existing hallucination detection methods rely primarily on modelinternal consistency checks or simplistic keyword matching against limited reference databases, failing to capture semantic nuances and cross-domain factual verification requirements. This paper presents the Verity AI framework: a Multi-Source Verification System using Artificial Intelligence (MVS-AI) that addresses these limitations through semantic embeddings, natural language inference (NLI) and AI-powered source alignment. The proposed framework decomposes LLMgenerated text into verifiable claims, retrieves evidence from diverse trusted sources including Wikipedia, PubMed, arXiv and web search results, then employs transformer-based models (sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 for embeddings, Facebook/bart-largemnli for NLI, and Groq's llama-3.3-70b-versatile for final verification) to determine claim veracity. Experimental validation demonstrates 87.3% accuracy in detecting hallucinated content, 34 % improvement over baseline keyword-matching approaches and robust performance across medical, scientific and general knowledge domains with an average confidence score of 78.2 %. This study introduces MVS-AI is a multi-source and domainadaptive solution to hallucination detection that employs semantic embeddings, natural language inference and artificial intelligence verification to provide greater precision, fewer false positives and trustworthy confidence levels across a multitude of fields.
title_zh: 利用多源证据与自然语言推理实现大型语言模型中的可靠幻觉检测
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLM）的兴起正在重塑自然语言处理（NLP）各个功能领域的发展，然而，尽管这些模型能够生成看似合理的回应，其生成内容却常常缺乏事实准确性，这种现象被称为“幻觉”（Hallucination）。这一关键缺陷严重削弱了人们对AI系统的信任，并在医疗、法律分析和教育内容生成等对事实准确性要求极高的领域带来了重大风险。现有的幻觉检测方法主要依赖模型内部一致性检查或基于有限参考数据库的简单关键词匹配，难以捕捉语义细微差别以及跨领域的事实验证需求。

本文提出Verity AI框架：一种基于人工智能的多源验证系统（MVS-AI），通过语义嵌入、自然语言推理（NLI）和AI驱动的来源对齐来克服上述局限。该框架将LLM生成的文本分解为可验证的陈述，从多样化的可信来源（包括维基百科、PubMed、arXiv及网络搜索结果）中检索证据，随后利用基于Transformer的模型进行判断——采用sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2进行语义嵌入，Facebook/bart-large-mnli执行自然语言推理，Groq的llama-3.3-70b-versatile模型完成最终验证。

实验验证表明，该框架在检测幻觉内容方面达到了87.3%的准确率，相较于基线关键词匹配方法提升了34%，并在医学、科学及通用知识等多个领域均表现出稳健性能，平均置信度达78.2%。本研究提出的MVS-AI是一种多源、跨领域自适应的幻觉检测解决方案，融合语义嵌入、自然语言推理与人工智能验证机制，显著提升了检测精度，减少了误报，并在多个应用领域提供了更可靠、值得信赖的置信水平。

title: Frugal Edge AI: Robust TinyML for Predictive Maintenance in Sri Lankan MSMEs
authors: Athithya Arunakirinathan
publish: 2026 6th International Conference on Advanced Research in Computing (ICARC)
abstract: The narrative of Industry 4.0 is often defined by high-bandwidth, cloud-centric cyber-physical systems. However, this paradigm is economically and operationally disconnected from the reality of Sri Lanka's manufacturing sector, which is dominated by Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) operating legacy “Brownfield” machinery. This paper proposes a “Frugal Edge AI” framework as a viable alternative to the traditional “Lift and Shift” digital transformation model. By retrofitting legacy equipment—specifically Orthodox Tea Rollers—with ultra-low-power Tiny Machine Learning (TinyML) models running on commodity microcontrollers (ESP32), manufacturers can achieve predictive maintenance capabilities without prohibitive Capital Expenditure (CAPEX). We introduce a Spectral Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) feature extraction pipeline capable of isolating mechanical fault signatures even in high-noise industrial environments (<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\sigma=0.2$</tex>). Simulation results on the Case Western Reserve University (CWRU) dataset demonstrate that while naive time-domain analysis fails (33.15% accuracy) under industrial noise, our noise-augmented frequency-domain model achieves 98.31% generalized accuracy while consuming only 7.98 KB of flash memory. Crucially, Hardware-in-the-Loop (HIL) benchmarking on the target ESP32 silicon validates real-time deployment feasibility, confirming an inference latency of 337.56 ms and a peak dynamic RAM usage of just 4.10 KB. Furthermore, comparative benchmarking reveals that optimized Random Forest ensembles offer a superior power-efficiency-to-accuracy ratio compared to lightweight Neural Networks for this specific domain. This confirms that localized, offline processing offers a sustainable path to Industry 5.0 resilience for the Global South. To ensure reproducibility of the “Vaccination Strategy” and quantization results, the source code and CWRU data splits are available at: https://github.com/Conference2026/Frugal-edge-ai.
title_zh: 节俭边缘AI：面向斯里兰卡中小微企业预测性维护的稳健小型机器学习
abstract_zh:
工业4.0的叙事通常以高带宽、以云为中心的网络物理系统为特征。然而，这一范式与斯里兰卡制造业部门的现实情况在经济和运营层面均存在脱节——该国制造业主要由使用老旧“棕地”设备的微小及中型企业（MSMEs）主导。本文提出一种“节俭边缘人工智能”（Frugal Edge AI）框架，作为传统“提升与迁移”数字化转型模式的可行替代方案。通过在现有设备（特别是传统茶叶滚筒机）上进行改造，采用运行于通用微控制器（ESP32）上的超低功耗微型机器学习（TinyML）模型，制造商可在不产生高昂资本支出（CAPEX）的前提下实现预测性维护能力。

我们引入了一种基于频谱信噪比（Spectral Signal-to-Noise Ratio, SNR）的特征提取流程，能够在高噪声工业环境（σ = 0.2）中有效识别机械故障特征。在凯斯西储大学（CWRU）数据集上的仿真结果表明：尽管原始时域分析在工业噪声下表现不佳（准确率仅33.15%），但经过噪声增强的频域模型仍可达到98.31%的泛化准确率，且仅消耗7.98 KB的闪存空间。关键的是，针对目标ESP32芯片的硬件在环（HIL）基准测试验证了实时部署的可行性，确认推理延迟为337.56毫秒，峰值动态RAM占用仅为4.10 KB。

此外，对比基准测试显示，在此特定应用场景下，优化后的随机森林集成模型相较于轻量级神经网络展现出更优的能效-精度比。这证实了本地化、离线处理为全球南方地区实现面向工业5.0的韧性发展提供了一条可持续路径。

为确保“疫苗策略”及量化结果的可复现性，源代码与CWRU数据划分已公开于：https://github.com/Conference2026/Frugal-edge-ai。

title: A First Principles Review of a Novel De Facto Preventive Cybersecurity Strategy
authors: Fazal Raheman, Tejas Bhagat, Panayiotis Kotzanikolaou, Javier G. Meana, Alfredo Cuzzocrea, Vincent Lefebvre, Sandeep Dongre, Anatolly Melnyk, Andrej Grebenc
abstract: Vulnerabilities in ICT infrastructure largely stem from the design practice of granting third-party permissions (TPPs) to software vendors. Our group was the first to demonstrate that TPPs are the root cause of systemic vulnerabilities, and that their elimination could enable a new paradigm—Zero Vulnerability Computing (ZVC). Legacy cybersecurity systems are reactive, multi-step, and human-driven, allowing vulnerabilities to emerge and then attempting to defend against them. This reactive posture contributes to the exponential rise in cybercrime, projected to reach $23.8 trillion by 2027. This paper advances the ZVC paradigm, which was tested and validated in our earlier work on hardware wallet experiments under the European Commission’s Grant program. We further investigate whether eliminating TPPs at the design phase conflicts with the first principles of software engineering. Rather than revalidating efficacy, we adopt a hypothesis-building approach supported by the historical deconstruction of computer design rules and previous empirical validation. Our analysis reveals that TPPs are recurrent design constructs rather than axiomatic necessities, and that their removal is architecturally viable. We evaluate ZVC’s viability and offer a comparative analysis that distinguishes ZVC from legacy Zero Trust models. ZVC’s core protocol operates without traditional user-facing cryptography, making it inherently resistant to quantum computing threats and capable of addressing approximately 90% of known “structural vulnerabilities.” The remaining 10%, mostly “semantic vulnerabilities,” can be mitigated through proactive strategies integrated with artificial intelligence. This review lays the foundation for a preventive, quantum-resilient cybersecurity paradigm that is automated, cost-effective, and future-proof. We conclude by outlining implementation challenges, open research questions, and future directions.
title_zh: 一种基于基本原理的新型事实性预防网络安全策略综述
abstract_zh:
信息技术（ICT）基础设施中的漏洞在很大程度上源于向软件供应商授予第三方权限（TPPs）的设计实践。我们的研究团队首次证明，TPPs是系统性漏洞的根本原因，而消除TPPs将能够开启一种全新的计算范式——零漏洞计算（Zero Vulnerability Computing, ZVC）。传统的网络安全体系是被动响应、多步骤且依赖人工的，这使得漏洞在出现后才试图进行防御，从而导致了网络犯罪的指数级增长，预计到2027年将达到23.8万亿美元。本文推进了ZVC范式的进一步发展，该范式已在我们此前参与欧盟委员会资助项目时开展的硬件钱包实验中得到测试与验证。

我们进一步探讨：在设计阶段消除TPPs是否违背软件工程的基本原则。不同于重复验证有效性，本研究采用假设构建的方法，结合计算机设计规则的历史解构以及先前的实证验证。分析表明，TPPs并非不可替代的基本要素，而是反复出现的设计模式；其移除在架构上是完全可行的。我们评估了ZVC的可行性，并提供了与传统“零信任”模型的对比分析。ZVC的核心协议无需依赖传统的面向用户加密技术，因而天然具备抵御量子计算威胁的能力，同时可解决约90%已知的“结构性漏洞”。剩余10%的漏洞，主要为“语义漏洞”，可通过集成人工智能的主动策略加以缓解。

本综述为建立一种预防性、抗量子、自动化、低成本且面向未来的网络安全新范式奠定了基础。最后，我们总结了实施过程中面临的技术挑战、开放的研究问题以及未来的发展方向。

title: Toward Unified Standards for Open RTL-to-GDSII Design Flows: Insights From the Open RTL-to-GDSII Flow Standards Workshop (ORFSW 2025) [Standards Corner]
authors: Hossam O. Ahmed, Ahmed Madian, Boon Chong Ang, Yongfu Li
abstract: The rapid expansion of open-source Electronic Design Automation (EDA) has created unprecedented opportunities for accessible, transparent, and collaborative chip design. However, the growing diversity of tools, data formats, and methodologies has also highlighted the urgent need for unified standards that ensure interoperability, scalability, and reproducibility across the complete RTL-to-GDSII design flow. The Open RTL-to-GDSII Flow Standards Workshop (ORFSW 2025) brings together academic researchers, industry leaders, open-source developers, and standards experts to explore emerging challenges and opportunities in establishing a cohesive framework for open silicon development. This workshop provides a platform for discussing standardization gaps in RTL design, synthesis, floorplanning, placement, and routing, timing closure, physical verification, and sign-off. Through invited talks, panel discussions, and community-driven dialogue, ORFSW 2025 aims to accelerate the creation of practical, consensus-based standards that enable reliable design portability, enhance toolchain interoperability, and support the long-term sustainability of the open hardware ecosystem. By fostering cross-domain collaboration, the workshop seeks to strengthen the global movement toward democratized chip design and further advance the IEEE CASS Standards Activities Subdivision’s mission to shape the future of open-source EDA and semiconductor innovation.
title_zh: 面向统一的开放RTL到GDSII设计流程标准：来自2025年开放RTL到GDSII流程标准研讨会（ORFSW 2025）的洞见 [标准专栏]
abstract_zh: 开源电子设计自动化（EDA）的迅猛发展，为可访问、透明且协作式的芯片设计创造了前所未有的机遇。然而，工具、数据格式和方法学日益多样化，也凸显出建立统一标准的紧迫需求，以确保从RTL到GDSII完整设计流程中的互操作性、可扩展性和可复现性。2025年开放式RTL至GDSII流程标准研讨会（ORFSW 2025）汇聚了学术研究人员、产业领袖、开源开发者及标准专家，共同探讨在构建统一开放硅片开发框架过程中面临的新挑战与新机遇。本次研讨会为讨论RTL设计、综合、布局规划、放置、布线、时序收敛、物理验证及签核等环节中的标准化空白提供了交流平台。通过特邀报告、圆桌讨论以及由社区主导的对话，ORFSW 2025旨在加速制定切实可行、共识驱动的标准，以实现可靠的设计可移植性，提升工具链的互操作性，并支持开源硬件生态系统的长期可持续发展。通过促进跨领域协作，研讨会致力于推动全球范围内芯片设计民主化的进程，进一步推进IEEE CASS标准活动分部“塑造开源EDA与半导体创新未来”的使命。

title: Research on Algorithm Optimization of Intelligent Editing System for Improving Editing Efficiency
authors: Wen Sun
publish: 2025 International Conference on Information Technology, Communication Ecosystem and Management (ITCEM)
abstract: The development of intelligent editing technology has provided a new direction for solving the problem of low efficiency in traditional text processing. Based on this, an intelligent editing system integrating deep learning and natural language processing technologies has been developed. The system incorporates intelligent correction, automatic layout, and content recommendation functions, and has been verified through rigorous experimental design to have significant advantages in improving editing efficiency. The data shows that the system has an accuracy rate of 95%, a processing speed increase of 68%, and a resource occupancy reduction of 46.7%. In user feedback, 89% of participants believed that the system effectively improved their work efficiency. This research achievement provides a new technological solution and practical reference for the field of intelligent editing.
title_zh: 智能编辑系统算法优化研究以提升编辑效率
abstract_zh: 智能编辑技术的发展为解决传统文本处理效率低下的问题提供了新的方向。基于此，开发了一套融合深度学习与自然语言处理技术的智能编辑系统。该系统集成了智能纠错、自动排版和内容推荐等功能，并通过严谨的实验设计验证，显著提升了编辑效率。数据显示，该系统准确率达95%，处理速度提升68%，资源占用降低46.7%。用户反馈显示，89%的参与者认为该系统有效提高了工作效率。这一研究成果为智能编辑领域提供了新的技术解决方案和实践参考。

title: Automated Detection of Web Application Vulnerabilities
authors: M. Dhilsath Fathima, N. Jithendra, N. Yasaswini
publish: 2026 8th International Conference on Intelligent Sustainable Systems (ICISS)
abstract: Web applications are primary component of digital services but are increasingly susceptible to security threats, such as SQL Injection, Cross Site Scripting, and Cross Site Request Forgery. Manual vulnerability detection is a difficult task and vulnerable to errors, needing automation and scalable approaches. The proposed model develops an Automated Web Application Vulnerability Detection system, which uses web crawling, intelligent fuzzing, and Adaptive Random Forest (ARF) classifier to detect and prioritize vulnerabilities in real time. This model extracts features such as payload length, frequency of special character, HTTP response parameters, and response variability, and computes severity scores to guide response reduction. This system utilizes an input dataset has HTTP requests and responses, including benign and malicious payloads targeting OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, and develops a web application, allowing user to view the output. Experimental evaluation on test dataset shows increased model performance over baseline machine learning models, achieving enhanced accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score. The framework adapts to obfuscated and zero-day payloads, ensuring robust detection of evolving threats. By combining automation, feature-driven ARF classification, and severity- based reporting, the proposed model provides an efficient, and actionable solution for securing modern web applications.
title_zh: Web应用漏洞的自动化检测
abstract_zh: Web应用是数字服务的核心组成部分，但正日益面临诸如SQL注入、跨站脚本（XSS）和跨站请求伪造（CSRF）等安全威胁。手动漏洞检测不仅难度大，且容易出错，因此亟需自动化和可扩展的解决方案。本文提出的模型构建了一个自动化的Web应用漏洞检测系统，该系统结合网络爬虫、智能模糊测试以及自适应随机森林（ARF）分类器，能够实时检测并优先排序漏洞。该模型提取了包括载荷长度、特殊字符频率、HTTP响应参数及响应变化性在内的多种特征，并计算严重性评分，以指导响应的优化处理。系统采用包含正常与恶意载荷（针对OWASP十大安全风险）的HTTP请求与响应数据集进行训练，并开发了一个Web应用界面，供用户查看检测结果。在测试数据集上的实验评估表明，该模型相较于基线机器学习模型，在准确率、精确率、召回率和F1分数方面均有显著提升。该框架还能有效应对混淆攻击和零日漏洞载荷，确保对不断演变的威胁具备强大的检测能力。通过融合自动化检测、基于特征的ARF分类以及基于严重性的报告机制，所提出的模型为保障现代Web应用安全提供了一种高效且可操作的解决方案。

title: RISC-V Area-Optimized ASIC Design with a Multi-Height 7nm FinFET Standard Cell Library
authors: Matheus Lemos, Clayton R. Farias, Paulo F. Butzen, José Rodrigo Azambuja
publish: 2026 IEEE 17th Latin America Symposium on Circuits and System (LASCAS)
abstract: The continuous scaling of semiconductor technology drives the demand for integrated circuits with higher performance and smaller area. In this context, standard cell libraries play a key role in optimizing digital designs. This paper presents the ASIC implementation of the PicoRV32 RISC-V CPU using a 4.5-Tracks multi-height standard cell library tailored for 7nm FinFET technology. While multi-height libraries are established, the novelty of this work lies in the practical demonstration of a complete back-end implementation, including logic synthesis, placement, routing, and area optimization. The utilization of the proposed 4.5-Tracks library achieves a 29% reduction in overall core area compared to a conventional 6-Tracks library, with DFFR and XNOR2 cells contributing most to this reduction. These results highlight the effectiveness of multi-height cells in real-world designs and provide practical guidance for future area optimized RISC-V ASIC developments.
title_zh: 基于多高度7nm FinFET标准单元库的RISC-V面积优化ASIC设计
abstract_zh: 半导体技术的持续缩放推动了对高性能、小面积集成电路的需求。在此背景下，标准单元库在优化数字设计中发挥着关键作用。本文介绍了基于专为7nm FinFET工艺定制的4.5轨多高度标准单元库实现的PicoRV32 RISC-V处理器的ASIC设计。尽管多高度单元库已得到广泛应用，但本工作的创新之处在于实现了完整的后端流程的实际演示，包括逻辑综合、布局布线及面积优化。采用所提出的4.5轨单元库相比传统的6轨单元库，整体核心面积减少了29%，其中DFFR和XNOR2单元对这一面积缩减贡献最大。这些结果凸显了多高度单元在实际设计中的有效性，并为未来面向面积优化的RISC-V ASIC开发提供了切实可行的指导。
